cards.example: At the moment, artemisinin-based therapies are considered the best treatment, but cost about $10 per dose - far too much for impoverished communities.
The minute stain on the document was not visible to the naked eye.
The committee worked in accord on the bill, and it eventually passed.

cards.back: clearly revealed to the mind or the senses or judgment
cards.example: That confidence was certainly evident in the way Smith handled the winning play with 14 seconds left on the clock.
